SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity

Class DigSiteGrid

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteGrid
Direct Known Subclasses:
DigSiteGridWithSquares
public class DigSiteGrid extends Object
Entity class representing a dig site grid in the game. Contains the game board dimensions and tracks which user is playing.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getHeight()
    Gets the height of this grid in squares.
    long
    getId()
    Gets the primary key identifier for this dig site grid.
    long
    getPlayerId()
    Gets the foreign key reference to the user playing this grid.
    int
    getRemainingBrushes()
    Gets the number of brush items remaining for extracting fossils.
    Instant
    getStartTime()
    Gets the timestamp when gameplay started on this grid.
    int
    getTotalFossils()
    Gets the total number of fossils hidden in this grid.
    int
    getWidth()
    Gets the width of this grid in squares.

    • getId

      Gets the primary key identifier for this dig site grid.

      Parameters:
      id - Grid ID.

    • getPlayerId

      public long getPlayerId()
      Gets the foreign key reference to the user playing this grid.
      Returns:
      User ID.

    • setPlayerId

      public void setPlayerId(long playerId)
      Sets the foreign key reference to the user playing this grid.
      Parameters:
      playerId - User ID.

      Gets the height of this grid in squares.
      Returns:
      Grid height.

      Sets the height of this grid in squares.

      height - Grid height.

      public int getWidth()
      Gets the width of this grid in squares.
      Returns:
      Grid width.

      public void setWidth(int width)
      Sets the width of this grid in squares.
      Parameters:
      width - Grid width.

    • getStartTime

      @NonNull public Instant getStartTime()
      Gets the timestamp when gameplay started on this grid.
      Returns:
      Start time.

    • setStartTime

      public void setStartTime(@NonNull Instant startTime)
      Sets the timestamp when gameplay started on this grid.
      Parameters:
      startTime - Start time.

    • getTotalFossils

      public int getTotalFossils()
      Gets the total number of fossils hidden in this grid.
      Returns:
      Total fossil count.

    • setTotalFossils

      public void setTotalFossils(int totalFossils)
      Sets the total number of fossils hidden in this grid.
      Parameters:
      totalFossils - Total fossil count.

    • getRemainingBrushes

      public int getRemainingBrushes()
      Gets the number of brush items remaining for extracting fossils.
      Returns:
      Remaining brushes count.

    • setRemainingBrushes

      public void setRemainingBrushes(int remainingBrushes)
      Sets the number of brush items remaining for extracting fossils.
      Parameters:
      remainingBrushes - Remaining brushes count.
